role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text/signage and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Hawthorn, Bramble) relevant to the hedgerows.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, markings, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Discussed camera generation and cross-domain visual artifacts.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United Kingdom. The agents provided high-quality, domain-specific evidence (hedgerows, climate, road width) that strongly supported the correct region and country. The final decision was well-grounded in the specialist consensus.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hedgerows and overcast sky match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification is consistent with the visual appearance of the hedges.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road width and markings described accurately.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Camera artifacts and road texture descriptions are consistent.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the United Kingdom.
